title: CI-RED-016-A: manifest-discipline bleed-stop wired into Core CI
intent: CI-RED-016-A is the small enforcement slice of CI-RED-016: stop net-new router files from bypassing router_registry discipline while the larger endpoint consolidation stays deferred. It is a ratchet, not a cleanup migration - it does not manifest the grandfathered routers, resolve endpoint ownership, reorder precedence, change live endpoint winners, or close CI-RED-016. It wires check_manifest_discipline.py into Core CI (before API boot/full pytest) with --require-baseline --fail-on-healed, replaces the regex-only route detector with an AST-first detector (regex fallback only on SyntaxError), and tightens the committed baseline to the accurate unmanifested set. Baseline 108->103: remove the healed routers/cam/geometry_authority_router (manifested by CI-RED-015-H) plus 6 regex false-positives that only ever matched @router examples inside docstrings/strings (api/deps/__init__, api/deps/rmos_stores, cam/dxf_validation_gate, core/store_registry, middleware/rate_limit, middleware/tier_gate), and ADD 2 genuine routers the @router.-only regex was blind to because they use descriptive receiver names (middleware/route_analytics_middleware via @analytics_router, routers/blueprint_cam/blueprint_cam_core_router via @contour_router/@preflight_router/etc). app/main.py's root-app @app endpoints are correctly NOT counted (mounted by construction).

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) check_manifest_discipline.py: DETECTION rebuilt on the Python AST (ast.parse + ast.walk). Route declarations are found only in real code, so route decorators/registrations that appear only in docstrings/strings/comments no longer false-positive (the old regex did - see removed baseline entries). Detection now covers BOTH decorator forms (@<recv>.get/post/put/patch/delete/head/options/trace/websocket/api_route) and programmatic forms (<recv>.add_api_route/add_api_websocket_route/add_route/websocket_route) on ANY router-like receiver, EXCLUDING the composition-root app (receiver named app/application, e.g. app/main.py) which is mounted by construction and needs no RouterSpec. A regex fallback (same router-scope rule, negative-lookahead on app/application) is used only when a file fails to parse. Added --fail-on-healed and ratchet-not-certification language to the OK/STATUS/DETECTION text. --require-baseline retained. (2) manifest_discipline_baseline.txt: tightened 108->103. Witnessed by set difference: healed = {routers/cam/geometry_authority_router + 6 docstring false-positives}; added = {middleware/route_analytics_middleware, routers/blueprint_cam/blueprint_cam_core_router} (real routers with non-`router` receiver names the old regex missed); app/main is NOT added (root-app exclusion). (3) tests/test_manifest_discipline.py: grew 18->29. New: AST ignores docstring/string/comment route examples; programmatic add_api_route/add_api_websocket_route detection; non-`router` receiver-name detection; root-app (@app / app.add_api_route) exclusion end-to-end; regex fallback on SyntaxError (router matches, app excluded); --fail-on-healed hard-fail (exit 1, asks for --update-baseline) and pass-when-current; --require-baseline resolved-missing-path; aggregator-prefix narrowness. Real-tree guards (checker output == committed baseline; geometry_authority_router covered; KNOWN_AGGREGATOR_PKGS pinned) retained. (4) core_ci.yml: the 'Manifest discipline bleed-stop' step (api-tests, before Boot API/full pytest) now runs --require-baseline --fail-on-healed. (5) CI_RED_015D_OPEN_DECISIONS.md / SPRINTS.md: CI-RED-016-A recorded as a bleed-stop only; CI-RED-016 endpoint consolidation stays OPEN.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: No prior workflow invoked check_manifest_discipline.py, so the ratchet was inert - a net-new unmanifested route file could land silently. This PR makes it a CI witness step, fixes a real detector accuracy bug (6 phantom docstring entries were grandfathered in the committed baseline; 2 genuine routers with descriptive receiver names were invisible to the @router.-only regex), and hardens missing/stale baselines into hard CI failures. Endpoint consolidation (CI-RED-016) is untouched and remains open.

commands_run: cd services/api && python scripts/check_manifest_discipline.py --require-baseline --fail-on-healed -> OK: no net-new unmanifested router files (baseline holds 103). bleed-stop ratchet, not full certification

AST-vs-regex real-tree witness: regex 269 router files (6 docstring false-positives, 3 descriptive-receiver misses) vs AST 269 (drops the 6 FPs, catches the misses, excludes app/main root endpoints); unmanifested 107->103 = -1 healed(geometry) -6 docstring-FP +2 genuine

cd services/api && python -m pytest tests/test_manifest_discipline.py -q -> 29 passed (api venv), incl. AST docstring-ignore, programmatic/non-router-receiver detection, root-app exclusion, regex fallback, --fail-on-healed, real-tree checker==baseline
yaml parse core_ci.yml OK; 'Manifest discipline bleed-stop' step runs --require-baseline --fail-on-healed before 'Boot API'

files.intent: Tighten baseline 108->103 to the accurate unmanifested set (drop 1 healed + 6 docstring false-positives, add 2 genuine descriptive-receiver routers)
files.behavior_change: none - frozen-set ratchet data, resynced to the corrected detector output

files.intent: AST-first route detection (regex fallback on SyntaxError); detect decorator+programmatic forms on any router-like receiver, exclude the root app; add --fail-on-healed; ratchet-not-certification language
files.behavior_change: more accurate detection (drops docstring false-positives, catches descriptive-receiver routers, excludes root app) + CI-only fail-hard on missing/stale baseline; ratchet semantics otherwise unchanged

files.intent: 29 unit tests (miniature tmp_path + AST behavior + --fail-on-healed + real-tree guards)
Run the manifest-discipline check with --require-baseline --fail-on-healed in api-tests before API boot/full pytest
Annotate stale uncommitted/untracked/unrun language as historical; preserve 015-D closure logic
Record CI-RED-016-A as a bleed-stop only under CI-RED-016
